docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-15-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT PAULINO PONCE FERRER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT FERRER, PAULINO PONCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
